name: education_vendor_patch_silently_changes_kestrel_car_fair
premise: A shooter drill scheduled tomorrow conflicts with a board meeting where parents promised to bring attorneys. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education vendor patch silently changes kestrel car fair has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Harper Hughes
agents.identity: I am Harper Hughes, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Okoye
agents.identity: I am Nadia Okoye, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on fairness.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on fairness for immediate traction on care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Harper Hughes must choose under care versus fairness. What does Harper Hughes do?
